---
name: Bug Report / 问题反馈
about: Report a bug in obsidian-knowledge-brain
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug / 描述问题**
What happened? What did you expect to happen?

**To Reproduce / 复现步骤**
1. Run command/trigger: ...
2. See error: ...

**Environment / 运行环境**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, Linux]
- Platform: [e.g. Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Skill version: [e.g. 4.0.0]

**Relevant files / 相关文件**
- `~/.obsidian-knowledge-brain/atoms.json` status:
- `CLAUDE.md` has pre-action injected? [yes/no]
- `_keyword_index.json` has `_global_atoms`? [yes/no]
